ValidationRule.description: Prevent User to create a campaign member with Contact/Lead that is opt out
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( !$User.BypassValidationRules__c, ISNEW(), OR( AND(TECH_ParentEventOptOut__c, Campaign.RecordTypeId = '01258000000cjmr'), AND(TECH_ParentNewsletterOptOut__c, Campaign.RecordTypeId = '01258000000cjms') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can not add a member opt out to this campaign.
